title: Note Block Tweaks
description: A simple resource pack for note block music creators.
body:
A simple resource pack for note block music creators.

This resource pack is specifically designed for filming note block music works and is not recommended for everyday use.

![Example: Happy Birthday Song](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2230a90bfe78180fe6e94db83fc3aea3ca92ddac.png)

This resource pack uses the model files from [XK Redstone Display](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xk-redstone-display) as markers for redstone repeaters, so it can be considered an add-on to that pack. Additionally, the font design in this pack is derived from [Rainbow Tale](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbowtale).

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b49c5ab6825d3296521beeae143f37f9a4cf6e8.png)
